claimText: UT Austin CTL teaching-policy guidance says using generative AI tools to create course-assignment responses in a way the instructor does not accept may be considered academic dishonesty by the university.
normalizedValue: Unacceptable instructor-disallowed AI-generated assignment responses may be academic dishonesty.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI in Teaching and Learning: Policies | Faculty Instructional Support and Development
